Summarize Gazepoint export inventory

Source: R/dataset-structure-audit.R
summarize_gazepoint_export_inventory.Rd

Creates a descriptive file inventory for a Gazepoint export folder or a vector of files. The function summarizes paths, extensions, file sizes, likely export types, and empty-file flags. It is intended for reproducibility and audit reporting only.

Usage

summarize_gazepoint_export_inventory(
  path,
  recursive = TRUE,
  include_hidden = FALSE,
  classify = TRUE
)

Arguments

path

Directory path, file path, or character vector of file paths.

recursive

Logical. If TRUE, directories are searched recursively.

include_hidden

Logical. If TRUE, hidden files are included.

classify

Logical. If TRUE, likely Gazepoint export types are inferred from file names using conservative keyword rules.

Value

A data frame with class gazepoint_export_inventory.
